review_title: Surprisingly Easy Tool for Teams New to Project Management (Especially Google Workspace Users)
description: Overall, Kanbanchi is simple, clean, and incredibly easy to roll out to teams who are new to project management tools. The learning curve is low, the support from the Kanbanchi team has been responsive, and it’s helped remote groups stay aligned and accountable without adding unnecessary complexity. For anyone working in Google Workspace and wanting a practical, approachable project management solution, especially for teams just beginning their PM journey, Kanbanchi is a great place to start.
author: Sara J.
pros: Kanbanchi has been such a helpful introduction to project management for teams who’ve never used a tool like this before. The fact that it sits so naturally inside Google Workspace makes adoption feel almost effortless. People can jump in, understand the layout, and start contributing without feeling overwhelmed. It’s also been great for remote teams. The real-time updates, shared visibility, and simple workflows have helped create alignment without long emails or endless check-ins. The Gmail integration and ability to attach Drive files directly to cards has been a game changer for keeping everything in one place.
cons: There are a few places where I’d love to see Kanbanchi go further, especially around reporting, dashboards, and more built-in automations that support scaling. Nothing that stops us from using it, but it’s an opportunity for the platform to mature.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Straightforward and user friendly but lacks some features
description: Generally good. Technical support isn't instant but is good when it comes.
author: Al T.
pros: It is easy to learn. A lot easier than many similar well known tools for agile projects. It's user friendly design has been helpful when getting people to use it is part of the challenge.
cons: Lacks a few features, 1) an integrated calendar function would be helpful alongside the Gantt view, 2) as a manager the ability to view multiple boards in one place would be useful and 3) the option to filter on custom fields would provide additional flexibility.

review_title: Kanbanchi Review
author: Miguel M.
pros: Different views and integrations options
cons: Missing a WBS view for display alternative forms
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: If you Kanban you should Kanbanchi
description: I am a new user but i don't regret setting up and using Kanbanchi and the support team are really good too - I had a small issue (it was mean not the software) and they responded fairly quickly.
author: Brett L.
pros: Easy to use and the Gmail integration is seamless. Security levels as it is in the Google Workspace platform so I can trust the solution for sensitive information protection
cons: It is pricy. I used a different solution at a previous company and the free version did a lot of what the cheapest version of Kanbanchi does. No App version
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Help Me Stay Creative and Productive!
description: Kanbanchi is a comprehensive product. The system is easy to use, and the customer service is great! Kanbanchi has become one of the best tools in our tech stack for running the business.
author: Jordan T.
pros: The integration with Google Workspace and the ability to set milestones and file share.
cons: I would like to have more report printing features.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: *THE* software of choice for project management!
description: 4.99 stars. Fantastic software ran by a fantastic team!
author: Christopher H.
pros: Honestly, it's just extremely integrated with Google Workspace. There is also zero learning curve. So, if your company is scaling and you don't have the resources or time to walk them through the ins and outs of the company's project management software - Kanbanchi is *the* software of choice. Customer support is incredible. Enhancement request are implemented quickly. And the price is just unbeatable. It's a must have and ArtiKen is here for the long term!
cons: The lack of a mobile application is probably the only con that comes to mind. There website is optimized for mobile but it's just not the same.

review_title: Kanbanchi Delivers - from Features to Support
description: Customer Experience: [sensitive content hidden] have been incredibly helpful - from the initial tool demonstration to timely email support. They’ve been hands-on and proactive in making sure we had everything we needed, which made the onboarding process smooth and efficient. Tool Capabilities: Kanbanchi is probably the best project management tool I’ve worked with. It strikes a great balance between simplicity and powerful features, and I’m hopeful it continues to evolve in the same direction. Pricing: The tool is affordable, and we truly appreciated the discounted rates and promos offered to us. It made choosing Kanbanchi even easier.
author: Kristel D.
pros: I appreciate that Kanbanchi offers both simple and complex project management experiences. Simple: For smaller organizations like ours, it helps us easily focus on priorities without the complexity or distractions of too many apps, cards, or unnecessary features. It provides an intuitive way to prioritize daily tasks efficiently. Complex: At the same time, Kanbanchi is incredibly robust. You can customize each board to fit your needs perfectly, making it ideal for larger teams or organizations with overarching goals. Plus, we get to connect it with Google Workspace (a feature not always available to other project management tools). Overall, it strikes a great balance between ease of use and powerful functionality.
cons: At the moment, I don’t see any significant cons. We’re still in the process of exploring the tool and maximizing its features. So far, it’s been a great fit for our team - even our leads have responded positively to it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent kanban board software
description: I have been using Kanbanchi for 8 years now, it has just been a very helpful product to me in organising work, home, and charitable projects. I have a complex life but I feel under control and organised.
author: Dan R.
pros: It works well and smoothly, the support is really quick and helpful. You can customise it to look good.
cons: Some features are pro features and you could end up spending much more money for these

review_title: Feedback of Kanbacnhi
description: Good as a way to keep track of your or your teams to-do's. However, not useful in projects with much complexity.
author: Elias F.
pros: Intuitive and easy to use. Great way to keep track of your to-do's.
cons: There are some issues that logically doesn't make sense to me, however, overall, it's a great product.

review_title: A one-stop shop for team work and productivity!
description: Kanbanchi has changed the way I work and stay on top of my tasks and backlogs. I hope to use it for personal productivity soon, and take my learnings of structured project management/scheduling from Kanbanchi wherever I go.
author: Abhinav J.
pros: The vast breadth of niceties and features that Kanbanchi has to offer, is simply unrivalled. For a Kanban board application, Kanbanchi goes out of its way to incorporate Gantt charts, email notification, integrations with Google Workspace and so much more! I appreciate how a user can tweak and customize even the most ostensibly trivial aspects of a board, to maximize the value for collaborative team projects. As a standalone productivity tool alone, it works to help me stay on top of my tasks, even when not working with a team.
cons: I'm nit-picking, but integration with Google Drive is a bit finicky, and sometimes the sharing feature refuses to work as expected, when trying to add assignees via Google Workspace.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Helpful Tool in a Messy Situation
description: great - and thank you for good customer service and walk through with your rep.
author: Jocelyn G.
pros: I came onboard and had to learn how to do recruiting with very little experience, training, or guidance. I had multiple systems and there was a gap between interviewing and onboarding that kanbanchi helped me fill and it kept me sane as i figured out the prcess - it has been helpufl mappign the process and making imporvements.
cons: Nothing stands out. I think trello had a feature where you could turn a task into a card and I didn't see that but, not a big deal. otherwise i think there are very few cons to using Kanbanchi that I can identify now.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Kanbanchi - all in one tool for project management
description: A good project management tool, especially if a person is using agile methods. Somewhat uneasy with managing monumental projects.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Very easy defining of resources; straightforward overviews, immaculate support.
cons: Complex integration with other suites like Google Workspace or Office 365

review_title: Kanbanchi for running an effective kanban board
description: Overall, Kanbanchi is very popular within our devOps team. However due to the expensive costs, only a limited set of users have edit-access to the board, & this curtails the collaboration.
author: Amit B.
pros: Ease of implementation. Integration features. Day-to-day usability.
cons: The cost per seat is ridiculously expensive.

review_title: It is indeed my Number 1
author: David G.
pros: This is touted as the number one Kanban app for the G Suite! I love both Kanban and Google services... and so, logically this Kanbanchi has been an easy choice for me. First, exports. I love the abiliy to export your data into a file format that can be easily used for analysis and reporting. We use Kanbanchi mainly for organizing our tasks (per person/team/priority) for the office. Easy for all team members to access and we even have a big screen on the office to see real time movement of our tasks from created to doing to done. Plus the look and feel of the app is great. Smooth as they say. Our rule is that for our tools to be easily adopted by the users/team, we need to make it simple, beautiful, and easy to use. Kanbanchi it is.
cons: No cons so far, pretty much loving this software for our Project Management and Task monitoring use case.

review_title: It's good for getting stuff out of your head
description: Brilliant.
author: Sarah L.
pros: Kanbanchi is easy to use, it's super easy to pick up and to start to help you organise your ideas. I probably use 1/100 of the available features and it is still really useful to me. I like that I can assign tasks to others and that I can see Done! In lovely calm green when I have been very productive. I like that I can see all the information as a list as well (I must admit I don't find Gannt charts very useful but lots of my projects are short and bitty) I love that I can add comments and links to files and web pages etc. if I need to. It's a really lovely programme to use when you have a busy and varied role like mine.
cons: I guess the only thing I don't like is that I have to spend some time plugging in all the information but that isn't the software's fault! Also, I would like there to be more resources, for example, 'So you use 1/100 of Kanban? Here's a simple way to take it up a notch!' like little lessons or something.

review_title: Best G Suite integration tool for project management
description: We can now manage our business with G Suite integration on Kanbanchi, this tool is really great. All the charts and integration plugins are readily available so that we can manage the project smoothly. Our clients are thereby happy !
author: EBIN E.
pros: The major advantage as said is the integration with Google and the ability to manage all the project details like Gantt Chart, Kanban boards etc in one place. Best and unique features that we liked is the 100% compatible with Google G Suite. The tool helps to make our team more compatible with the project needs and make them more efficient. Our all major issues faced during project management is being overcome with the use of this great tool !
cons: The major issue is with the lack of a mobile app, they do not have iOS and Android app. This will make us to monitor the changes on web browser. Please release the app asap.

review_title: Frequent Kanban User
description: Overall I am happy to use kanban every day at work. I have to do a lot of organizing and planning deadlines so it helps me visualize it all
author: Courtney R.
pros: I like the ease of use, it is very easy to catch on. It really does have a ton of features in it. I feel like I'm finding a new useful tool every day. I like that you are able to make suggestions and that the customer support team actually responds.
cons: Sometimes throughout the day my kanban wont update to show a cards new position until I physically click on the card. I do also wish you could subscribe to a column or list itself rather than just specific cards or all cards

review_title: Ease of collaboration
description: I think I've covered this above.
author: Helen C.
pros: We use Kanban across our widely geograpgically distributed organisation where each centre has different IT systems and cultural influences. For us the collaboration aspect is key and it is so easy to share Kanban boards with others and modify in virtual meetings. Our organisation has used it for project management tracking, for process management and building individual or team to do lists. Being able to identify who should have input when, and them getting reminded of it is useful. It's also easy to customise in terms of branding and colours to make it feel more like part of your organisation.
cons: Being lazy I mostly dislike having to learn new software but this is a great addition to G suite as far as I'm concerned.

review_title: review
description: very reseptive and helpful with trouble shooting
author: Melissa S.
pros: checklists timelines multiple board prioritzation
cons: sharing files for users w multiple email addresses that work same boards

review_title: Best kanban board app that is fully integrated with G Suite
description: I really liked Kanbanchi and will choose over any other kanban board app. It is very useful for me because our organization relies heavily on G Suite. The seamless integration makes our work faster.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Kanbanchi is the best kanban board application I used that is fully integrated with Google Drive. - Kanban cards is highly customizable. Color can be edited. Tags and priority (Low – Critical) can be added. - Start date, due date, estimated and actual time spent can be set and recorded. - It has a clean and intuitive design. All activity in the card may be viewed in a separate tab. - Due dates may be added to Google Calendar.
cons: - No smartphone version. - Gantt chart is available only for the paid version.

review_title: Simple. Easy. Efficient.
author: Robert M.
pros: I love that all of my team has the ability to time-track their tasks. This gives upper management a true sense of how long it takes to do various tasks. Thus, this speeds up our efficiencies for future projects, and at the same time, allows us to know when support is needed.
cons: The only thing our company can think of is Kanbanchi not having a true app for its platform. The internet-based "app" option is good, but our team would love an app to come out soon.

review_title: Kanbanchi the best tools to communicate
description: We like to use Kanbanchi to communicate and work together across all the city and different places. We would need to use it to connect us especially we are working individually.
author: Jing Heng T.
pros: For us as non profit organization, we really do need some tools that allow us to keep track of our team especially we are working at different places.
cons: The pricing for Kanbanchi is considerably high even for non profit organizations 50% discount
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great customer support
description: The platform is still being developed, but the team are friendly, reply quickly, and have clear simple to follow instructions for non tech heads like me.
author: Bronwyn P.
pros: I am new to Kanbanch and had a number of questions before purchasing. The team answered my emails promptly, heard my requests and actioned developments in some of those areas that have already been released. I am really impressed with the team and their apparent commitment to continuing to develop the platform.
cons: I'm looking forward to the release of the kanbanchi app, but can work around that by saving a link to my phone's home screen for now. The program is a little slow to open, only a couple of seconds, but longer than many others.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good PM Tool
author: Jeff M.
pros: Ease of use and managing projects at a distance with plug in to Google Drive
cons: The product does everything I need it to do
author_profession: director of instructional technology and delivery systems

review_title: VERY GOOD
description: LOVE MY EXPERIENCE SO FAR WITH KANBANCHI. THE CUSTOMER SERVICE IS AMAZING. HIGHLY RECOMMEND
author: EJ W.
pros: I LOVE HOW CUSTOMIZABLE IT IS AND HOW EASILY YOU'RE ABLE TO ORGANIZE EACH PROJECT
cons: I LIKE EVERYTHING ABOUT THIS SOFTWARE - THERE'S NOTHING I LIKE LEAST
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
